title: Her Panelled Door
writer: Guy Morgan, Ladislao Vajda, Theresa Charles
actors: Phyllis Calvert, Edward Underdown, Helen Cherry
plot: A young woman with amnesia finds herself in London during the second world war. She falls in love and marries a Polish man in the R.A.F. He gets killed and then a crippled man comes to her and says she is his wife. She goes with h...
